verses.1: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,
verses.2: Dominion and fear [are] with him, he maketh peace in his high places.
verses.3: Is there any number of his armies? and upon whom doth not his light arise?
verses.4: How then can man be justified with God? or how can he be clean [that is] born of a woman?
verses.5: Behold even to the moon, and it shineth not; yea, the stars are not pure in his sight.
verses.6: How much less man, [that is] a worm? and the son of man, [which is] a worm?
